summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Fairygarden For You i18n implementation and form validation. All tests pass successfully.

language_switching.notes: All 4 languages switch correctly, dropdown displays all options

navigation_i18n.notes: Navigation menu translates correctly in all 4 languages

diy_kits_i18n.notes: Section title and button text translate correctly

for_business_i18n.notes: Form labels, buttons, and email address verified

workshops_i18n.notes: Section title, form labels, workshop types dropdown all translate correctly

cart_drawer_i18n.notes: Cart title, empty message, buttons translate correctly in all 4 languages

footer_i18n.notes: Quick Links header and subscribe button translate correctly

for_business.notes: Privacy checkbox visible and required, form submits successfully when checked

workshops.notes: Privacy checkbox visible and required, form submits successfully when checked

footer_newsletter.notes: Privacy checkbox visible and required, form submits successfully when checked

workshop_register.notes: POST /api/workshop/register works for all 4 workshop types

seed_data_creation: Created test data with TEST_ prefix using unique UUIDs for each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full i18n test suite created with 4 spec files covering navigation, sections, forms, and cart/footer translations. Backend API tests in pytest covering all endpoints. All checkboxes working correctly with native HTML5 validation.
